name: Get Node
summary: Bootstrap and health-check urirun nodes from get.ifuri.com through node:// URI routes.
description: Get Node is an external urirun connector package. It exposes the get.ifuri.com node bootstrap one-liner and a local runtime health check as node:// routes, declared with a typed @handler and projectable to MCP tools / A2A skills. Both routes are read-only and contact no network at call time.
useCases: Hand a new machine the canonical get.ifuri.com bootstrap command from a flow.
Health-check the local urirun runtime (version, importability, CLI) from a URI route.
Expose node bootstrap and health to MCP/A2A so agents can prepare hosts.
